历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4297 → 4243 → 7123 → 7430 → 8730. Rankings were basically stable in 2021–2022, but shifted significantly downward from 2023, with a cumulative decline of about 4487 positions over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 8730, with a clear downward trend. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 32 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 36 in 2024, and 40 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 36, a reduction of 4 (-10%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 29th, and has been stable in the 28–31 range in recent years, making it a top-tier normal university nationwide. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 28th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, maintaining stable application attention. It has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including Statistics A+, Software Engineering A, Mathematics A, Psychology A, Physics A-, and Biology A-, highlighting strong science and engineering disciplines that attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category applicants. The number of provincial Physics Category applicants in 2026 is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Guangdong applicants. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 3–4%, with recent enrollment numbers first increasing and then decreasing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in historical rankings, the reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-10%) intensifying competition, and the slight increase in Physics Category applicants (+3.6%), based on the 2025 baseline of 8730, the ranking is expected to move slightly upward (reduced enrollment intensifies competition, ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8256, with a range of 7756–8756.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7756–8756, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 7756), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as the Statistics Double Degree and Mathematics. If the ranking is near the upper bound (around 8756), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net, noting that Biological Sciences has average employment prospects.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 28–31 range in recent years, making it a top-tier normal university in China; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking 28th (relatively hot), short video exposure at an upper-middle level, maintaining stable application attention; 14 disciplines including Education A+, Sports Science A+, Statistics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Psychology A, Mathematics A, Software Engineering A, and Geography A have been rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength, which strongly attracts applicants to normal, humanities, history, philosophy, and science majors.
